_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: the ripretinib–trametinib combination treatment was more effective than trametinib alone and led to significant tumor regression
details: Ripretinib-trametinib combination led to significant tumor regression in MPNST-2 PDX, more effective than trametinib alone
